description: HK Royalties Ltd — Hong Kong — Royalty — NO_TREATY (domestic 20% applies)
legal_notes: Hong Kong is not in Poland's treaty network. Poland–Hong Kong DTC does not exist. The Polish-China DTC (1989) does not extend to Hong Kong (separate tax jurisdiction since 1997 handover). No EU I&R Directive (non-EU jurisdiction). Domestic WHT rate 20% applies unconditionally. BO test is not invoked — there is no treaty benefit to claim or deny.

input.substance_notes: Hong Kong company holding patents licensed to Polish subsidiary. Substance is irrelevant — no treaty exists between Poland and Hong Kong. Domestic Art. 21 ust. 1 pkt 1 CIT Act applies: 20% flat WHT on royalties paid to non-residents without a treaty.

expected.eval_note: No treaty → domestic rate 20%. BO test bypassed. agent must not hallucinate a PL-HK treaty.
